message: Hi Julia! I was wondering — for the fitting on the 12th, could we move the time from 10am to 11am? Also I wanted to ask about the veil, are we still on to discuss that?
draft: Hi Sofia! Of course, I've moved your April 12th fitting to 11am — no problem at all. And yes, absolutely, we'll go over the veil together during the fitting. Can't wait to see how everything looks on you! 🤍
